name: Libella AAV-hTERT Alzheimer disease phase 1 registry
summary: Single-arm phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov registry of intravenous AAV-hTERT for Alzheimer disease, with adverse events as the primary outcome and no posted results.
population: Estimated 5 adults aged 45 years or older with Alzheimer disease

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Registry text records estimated completion in January 2021 and the June 10, 2026 check still found no posted results; keep out of active anticipation until structured dates or a retirement sweep are added.
trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed estimated primary and study completion in January 2021, but had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Disease-context AAV-hTERT registry, not broad aging evidence.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The registry helps define the AAV-hTERT boundary: neurodegenerative disease claims still lack posted safety, telomerase, telomere-length, biomarker, or cognitive results.
